text:
Created attachment 193051
Patch to update the port to 1.4.1

Update port to Gitea 1.4.1

Release Notes: https://blog.gitea.io/2018/05/release-of-1.4.1/

This release contains important security fixes so it is highly recommended to update to latest release.

BREAKING: Add “error” as reserved username (#3882) (#3886)
